basic_details.job_title: AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Ayushman Arogya Mandirs Gonda (AAM Gonda) Yoga Instructor (Male) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AAM Gonda. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age as on 30-06-2026

qualification.education_qualification: BNYS Degree, BA(Yoga)/BSc(Yoga)/MA Yoga, PG Diploma in Yoga, Yoga Certification Board Certificate
qualification.details: Preference to BNYS degree from recognized university/institute or BA(Yoga) 3 years/BSc(Yoga)/MA Yoga with 1 year experience or PG Diploma (min 1 year) with 2 years experience or Yoga Certification Board New Delhi Yoga Wellness Instructor certificate with 1 year experience. Local resident preferred for Health Wellness Centre. Experience certificate valid only after obtaining PG Diploma/certificate.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: gonda.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AAM Gonda Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Preference to BNYS degree from recognized university/institute or BA(Yoga) 3 years/BSc(Yoga)/MA Yoga with 1 year experience or PG Diploma (min 1 year) with 2 years experience or Yoga Certification Board New Delhi Yoga Wellness Instructor certificate with 1 year experience. Local resident preferred for Health Wellness Centre. Experience certificate valid only after obtaining PG Diploma/certificate.

content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age as on 30-06-2026

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: gonda.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor (Male) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Yoga Instructor (Male) post is 31st July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Instructor (Male) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a BNYS degree, BA(Yoga)/BSc(Yoga)/MA Yoga, PG Diploma in Yoga, or a Yoga Certification Board Certificate. Specific experience requirements are also detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Yoga Instructor (Male) post is between 21 years and 65 years as of 30th June 2026. Age relaxation details, if any, are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. How much is the salary for the Yoga Instructor (Male) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 8000 per month for the contractual Yoga Instructor (Male) position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for AAM Gonda Yoga Instructor recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Yoga Instructor (Male) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview. Candidates are advised to prepare accordingly for both stages.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Yoga Instructor (Male) position is a contractual job. The duration of the contract is as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Ayushman Arogya Mandirs Gonda, which is gonda.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any preference for local residents?
faq.answer: Yes, local residents are preferred for the Health Wellness Centre positions. This preference is mentioned in the eligibility criteria for the Yoga Instructor (Male) post.
